login.title: BookOasis
login.subtitle: Your Personal Book Oasis
login.failed_msg: Login failed. Please check your username and password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_latest_books: No books registered yet. Try scanning your library.

settings.title: Settings
settings.schedule_subtitle: Manage synchronization scan schedules (Cron) for each category and run immediately.
settings.general_subtitle: Configure and manage the overall environment parameters of BookOasis Media Server.
settings.plugins_subtitle: Manage activation toggles and details configurations for loaded dynamic plugins.
settings.plugins_gallery_desc: List of useful extensions that can be freely added through BookOasis's unique dynamic plugin architecture. To add a plugin, please refer to the development document or GitHub repository.
settings.plugin_pixiv_desc: Integrate Pixiv account bookmarks and new works from subscribed illustrators to stream high-resolution illustrations directly in the BookOasis viewer without local downloading.
settings.plugin_comicinfo_desc: Analyze the ComicInfo.xml standard tag inside zip/cbz archive comic files to sync creator, genre, summary, and series information without search.
settings.plugin_webnovel_desc: Map with major domestic web novel database sites to match and enrich cover illustrations, author profiles, and serialization info with one click.
settings.report_subtitle: Monitor abnormal book details such as corrupted compressed files and cover extraction errors generated during scanning, by category.
settings.report_empty_message: Please select a category and report to view detailed error list.
settings.user_subtitle: To maintain a private account ecosystem, administrator directly registers new reading users and controls deletion.
settings.thumb_width_desc: Adjust the cover image size of the books in the library from 120px to 240px using the slider to optimize for your monitor resolution.
settings.page_limit_desc: The unit quantity of book cards to render on one screen during infinite scrolling or library loading.
settings.db_pool_desc: Reused DB connections when concurrent access increases. Recommended SQLite configuration is 15-25, capped at 50.
settings.log_dev: Real-time output and file logging (Dev Mode)
settings.log_prod: Mute logs (Recommended / Disk Space Saving Mode)
settings.scanner_log_desc: Defines log verbosity during background scans. Disabling dramatically reduces file size and server overhead.
settings.rclone_rc_desc: rclone RC server addresses accessed by scanner to refresh drive mount cache. Support comma separation for multiple URLs.
settings.comic_delay_desc: Delay before showing loading overlay after image load starts. Recommended 500ms+ for remote setups like Cloudflare.
settings.lazy_cron_desc: Background scanner execution interval that extracts missing covers every 3s. (Default: 0 3 * * * every day)
settings.recent_limit_desc: Maximum books limit to display in 'Recent Readings' sidebar. (Default: 30)
settings.hide_completed_label: Hide Completed Books in Recent History
settings.sys_mem_desc: Pause scan when system free memory falls below this limit to prevent crash. (Default: 1536MB)
settings.proc_rss_desc: Safely restart scanner process when its memory usage exceeds this limit to avoid leaks. (Default: 2048MB)
settings.proxy_auth_label: Proxy Header Auth (Reverse Proxy SSO Auto Login)
settings.proxy_auth_desc: [WARNING] Enable only in homelab setups behind reverse proxy (Authentik, Authelia). Trust HTTP header Remote-User to create passwordless session. Direct exposure without proxy is a critical security vulnerability!
settings.server_error: An error occurred connecting to server.
